brand_identity.name: ResearchAI Hub
brand_identity.description: A tactical command center for automated deep research. The interface feels like a high-performance instrument—dense, responsive, and data-forward.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and card titles. Letter-spacing: -0.02em.

body.usage: Use for all standard text, inputs, and descriptions.

mono.usage: Use for ID tags, prompts, JSON previews, and code snippets.

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use a subtle moving gradient border on active states or high-value cards.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full gradients. Use subtle radial gradients in backgrounds: bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-indigo-900/20 via-[#020617] to-[#020617].

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.default: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-sm h-11 text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-600

cards.default: bg-[#0f172a] border border-slate-800 rounded-sm overflow-hidden hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-slate-800 text-slate-300

tables.header: bg-slate-900/50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-semibold

dashboard_home.description: A high-density command center. Top row: Key Metrics (Credits, Research Runs, Success Rate). Middle: Recent Activity (List) + Quick Actions (Cards). Bottom: System Status.

research_builder.description: Left Column (40%): The Input Form (Step-by-step). Right Column (60%): Live Preview / Console Log. The right side updates as the user selects options, showing the 'AI Reasoning' or 'Prompt Preview' to build trust.

results_view.description: Maximize screen real estate. Sidebar filters (collapsible). Main content is a powerful Data Table with sticky headers. Use 'Drawer' or 'Sheet' for row details instead of navigating away.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Small sizes (w-4 h-4) for UI elements, Large (w-6 h-6) for navigation.

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on click. Cards lift on hover (-translate-y-1). Input focus glows.
motion.page_transition: Fade in (opacity-0 to opacity-100) with slight slide up (translate-y-4 to translate-y-0).

rules: Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1 against the dark background.
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-indigo-500).
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, section).
All icons must have aria-label if no text accompanies them.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the file structure: /app/frontend/src/pages for routes, /app/frontend/src/components for UI.
Implement the 'Split Wizard' layout for the Research Builder - this is the core feature.
Ensure the 'Results Table' handles long text gracefully (truncate with tooltip).
Do NOT use gradients for text. Keep text solid white or grey for readability.
Ensure the dark mode is consistent - avoid 'pure black' (#000000), use Slate-950 (#020617) instead.
For the 'Research History', use a list view with status badges (Pending, Completed, Failed).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
